Publications

Peer reviewed

  1. Michael Raatz, Amanda de Azevedo-Lopes, Karolina Drabik, Arne Traulsen, Bartlomiej Waclaw. Pathogen non-planktonic phases within the urinary tract impact early infection and resistance evolution ISME, v. 18, wrae191, 2024
  2. Amanda de Azevedo‑Lopes, Renan A. L. Almeida, Paulo Murilo C. de Oliveira, and Jeferson J. Arenzon. Energy‑lowering and constant‑energy spin flips: Emergence of the percolating cluster in the kinetic Ising model, Phys. Rev. E, v. 106, p. 044105, 2022.
  3. Onofrio Mazzarisi, Amanda de Azevedo‑Lopes, Jeferson J. Arenzon, and Federico Corberi; Maximal Diversity and Zipf’s Law, Phys. Rev. Lett., v.127, p. 128301, 2021 Destaque em física da Sociedade Brasileira de Física
  4. Amanda de Azevedo‑Lopes, André R. de la Rocha, Paulo Murilo C. de Oliveira, and Jeferson J. Arenzon. Dynamical cluster size heterogeneity, Phys. Rev. E, v.101, p. 012108, 2020
  5. R Erichsen Jr, A de Azevedo-Lopes, SG Magalhaes. Multicritical points and topology-induced inverse transition in the random-field Blume-Capel model in a random network, Phys. Rev. E, v.95, p. 062113, 2017
